items.caption: A phone case with a colorful gradient background transitioning from red to orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. the case has a cutout for the camera and flash at the top. on the case, there is text in white that reads "create your case." the style of the image is a product display with a plain white background, emphasizing the phone case and its design.

A phone case with a graphic of a cartoon character, a boy with large eyes and a frown, wearing a black suit. the character is set against a plain background. the phone case is designed to fit an iphone 8 plus, as indicated by the text on the image. the style of the image is a product display with a focus on the phone case's design.
A smartphone with a Sandmarc case rests on a rustic wooden table, highlighting modern technology in a natural setting.
items.creator: Erik Mclean
